successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveType, LeaveRequestStatus, LeaveRequest, and CreateLeaveRequestDto exactly as defined in the phase architecture.
src/modules/audit/audit.model.ts exists and exports AuditAction, AuditRecord, and CreateAuditRecordDto exactly as defined in the phase architecture.
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exports LeaveRepository and PostgreSqlLeaveRepository with createLeaveRequest(dto), findById(id), and updateStatus(id, status) signatures as specified.
createLeaveRequest(dto) persists a LeaveRequest with status 'PENDING' and creates a corresponding AuditRecord with action 'CREATED' through AuditRepository.
src/modules/audit/audit.repository.ts exports AuditRepository and PostgreSqlAuditRepository backed by PostgreSQL using pg Pool.
Vitest unit tests verify createLeaveRequest() stores a PENDING LeaveRequest, writes an AuditRecord, and findById() returns the persisted record.
Project documentation is updated to document LeaveType, LeaveRequestStatus, AuditAction, and the AuditRecord relationship to LeaveRequest.

constraints: Use the repository pattern: all database access must go through repository interfaces.
All state-changing operations must write an audit record.
PostgreSqlLeaveRepository.createLeaveRequest() must persist a LeaveRequest with status 'PENDING' regardless of input status.
Implement PostgreSQL-backed repositories using pg Pool.
Maintain architecture dependency direction; leave may depend on audit, and no reverse dependency from audit to leave repository logic is introduced.
No unhandled promise rejections; all async errors must be caught and handled.
Use the provided SQL schema and canonical type definitions exactly as specified.
Limit implementation to the specified model, repository, and unit test files for this phase.
outOfScope: Leave workflow service logic beyond repository persistence
Manager approval and rejection workflow implementation

ambiguities.description: The intent requires a documentation update but does not specify the target documentation file or location.
options: Update an existing project documentation file if one exists
Create a new documentation entry dedicated to LeaveRequest and AuditRecord concepts
